state.title: Read all specified files

input.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts
- Public surface: main entry point, Hono class export, hc client helper
- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoRequest, handle, RequestError
- Imports or neighbors: no top-level imports, uses types from ./types
- Plain-English summary: main module exports core Hono class and utility helpers
- Copy-safe detail: exports Hono class and handle/utility functions

## src/types.ts
- Public surface: Route handler types, HTTP method types, context/request/request-like types
- Internal names noticed: Env, HandlerContext, Input, Context, Request, HonoRequest, FetchEventHandler, Next, MiddlewareOptions, EnvDefaults, MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse, EnvToHandlerKeys, MergeSchemaPath, MergePathMap, Schema, HttpMethod, Method, Status
- Imports or neighbors: no imports, defines core type utilities
- Plain-English summary: central type definitions for routing, context, handlers, and validation
- Copy-safe detail: all exported types are re-exports or unions of primitive types

## src/hono.ts
- Public surface: Hono constructor, hc client builder
- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoRequest, AppHono, AppRequest
- Imports or neighbors: imports from types, hono-base, request
- Plain-English summary: creates Hono app instance and wireframes client
- Copy-safe detail: exports app builder and client via namespace

## src/hono-base.ts
- Public surface: HonoBase class, request method
- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, Route, RouterRoute, Router, getRouter, setRouter, RouteMethodStore, addRoute, matchRoute, handleRequest, init, fetch, routing, on, use, get, post, put, delete, patch, options, onAny
- Imports or neighbors: imports types, context, request, compose, utils/http-status, utils/http-method
- Plain-English summary: core router-based framework with middleware chain and method handlers
- Copy-safe detail: class-based with protected store and typed route registration

## src/context.ts
- Public surface: Context constructor, get/variable/h/data/s/set/get, status method, type, set/res methods, json method, get, method, url, header method
- Internal namesnoticed: Context, setVar, setVars, getVar, getVars, setCtx, h, getData, getReq, getResp, finalized, varData, res, req, routeIndex, method, url
- Imports or neighbors: imports request, types, utils/secure-headers, utils/cache, utils/compress, utils/cookie
- Plain-English summary: encapsulates request lifecycle with variables, status, headers and response
- Copy-safe detail: mutable state via internal map, no top-level functions

## src/request.ts
- Public surface: request() method, HonoRequest class
- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, GET_MATCH_RESULT, cloneRawRequest, RouteMethodStore, parseBody, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecodeURIComponent, HTTPException
- Imports or neighbors: imports context, types, utils/body, request/constants, http-exception
- Plain-English summary: main request type and clone utility for body management
- Copy-safe detail: class with internal symbols and body caching logic

## src/request/constants.ts
- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
- Imports or neighbors: no top-level imports
- Plain-English summary: singleton module exporting a unique symbol for request internals
- Copy-safe detail: single named export

## src/utils/body.ts
- Public surface: BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, parseBody, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, HonoRequest
- Imports or neighbors: imports request, exports body-related types and functions
- Plain-English summary: parses multipart/form-data and urlencoded form bodies
- Copy-safe detail: all functions and types are exported

## src/compose.ts
- Public surface: compose function
- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, Context, Env, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Next, index, middleware, length, routeIndex
- Imports or neighbors: imports context, types
- Plain-English summary: composes middleware into a single async dispatch chain
- Copy-safe detail: factory function returning composed middleware

## src/http-exception.ts
- Public surface: HTTPException class, Res, getResponse
- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, res, status, status: ContentfulStatusCode, message, cause
- Imports or neighbors: imports types/utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: throws for auth failures and other fatal errors with status codes
- Copy-safe detail: class stores status res and message, derives response on demand

## src/client/index.ts
- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, FetchClient, ClientPath
- Imports or neighbors: re-exports from client/client, client/utils, types
- Plain-English summary: main client module exposing main utility functions
- Copy-safe detail: all exports are re-exports from submodules

## src/client/client.ts
- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
- Internal names noticed: hc, ClientRequestImpl, fetch, query, form, json, param, url, body, method, deepMerge, replaceUrlParam, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlProtocol, buildSearchParams, WebSocket, serialize
- Imports or neighbors: imports hono, types, utils/cookie, client/types, client/utils
- Plain-English summary: builds request paths and proxies to fetch with query param handling
- Copy-safe detail: proxy factory for method chaining and URL merging

## src/client/types.ts
- Public surface: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType
- Internal names noticed: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, Status, Method, Schema, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, ExpandAllMethod, BuildPath, BuildPathname, BuildSearch, HonoURL, TypedURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickRoute, PickSchema, PickResponseByStatusCode, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, UnionToIntersection, HasRequiredKeys, ContentfulStatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, METHODS
- Imports or neighbors: imports hono, hono-base, router, types, utils/http-status, utils/types, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE
- Plain-English summary: full type system for typed HTTP client generation
- Copy-safe detail: hundreds of nested generics and conditional types

## src/client/utils.ts
- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
- Internal names noticed: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, isObject, deepMerge
- Imports or neighbors: imports http-status types, fetch-result-please, types
- Plain-English summary: string utilities for building URLs and query params, merge objects
- Copy-safe detail: pure functions with no side effects, exports named functions

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
- Inner names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
- Imports or neighbors: no external imports, adapted from fetch-result-please
- Plain-English summary: wraps fetch with automatic type inference and error handling
- Copy-safe detail: functions return parsed data from Response objects

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- Public surface: fire, handle
- Internal names noticed: fire, handle, E, S, BasePath, addEventListener, FetchEvent, HandleOptions, RequestResponse, app, app.fetch, evt, options, response
- Imports or neighbors: imports hono, types, adapter/service-worker/handler
- Plain-English summary: registers Hono app in a Service Worker via fetch event
- Copy-safe detail: two exported functions for adapter setup

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- Public surface: handle, HandleOptions
- Internal names noticed: handle, Handler, HandleOptions, FetchEvent, evt, res, opts, fetch, request, status, respondWith, bound fetch
- Imports or neighbors: imports hono, types, adapter/service-worker/types
- Plain-English summary: wraps Hono app with Service Worker fetch handler logic
- Copy-safe detail: function returns event handler with fallback to global fetch on 404

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
- Public surface: FetchEvent
- Internal names noticed: ExtendEvent, FetchEvent, waitUntil, Event
- Imports or neighbors: no external imports, defines adapter-specific event shape
- Plain-English summary: event interface for Service Worker fetch handlers
- Copy-safe detail: single interface with method signatures and properties

## Path Inventory
- src/index.ts
- src/types.ts
- src/hono.ts
- src/hono-base.ts
- src/context.ts
- src/request.ts
- src/request/constants.ts
- src/utils/body.ts
- src/compose.ts
- src/http-exception.ts
- src/client/index.ts
- src/client/client.ts
- src/client/types.ts
- src/client/utils.ts
- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
